mapper.select: SELECT chat_msg.id AS msgId, send_user_id AS sendUserId, msg, create_time AS tempTime, msg_status.`status` AS status FROM chat_msg LEFT JOIN msg_status ON chat_msg.id = msg_status.msg_id AND msg_status.user_id = #{friendId} WHERE ( (accept_user_id = #{userId} AND send_user_id = #{friendId}) OR (accept_user_id = #{friendId} AND send_user_id = #{userId}) ) AND create_time < #{dateTime} ORDER BY create_time DESC , chat_msg.id DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT COUNT(1) AS count, c.send_user_id AS friendUserId FROM chat_msg AS c INNER JOIN friends AS f ON c.accept_user_id = f.user_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND sign_flag = false GROUP BY c.send_user_id
